name: CSX CORP
summary: CSX Corporation, through its subsidiary CSXT, operates as a Class I freight railroad providing rail-based transportation services across its network. The company transports a variety of commodities and products, including hazardous materials, as a common carrier by rail. CSX also faces competition from motor carriers, barges, ships, and pipelines across its service area.
